## Summary
- Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs/CI

## Validation
- [ ] Backend tests pass (`python manage.py test`)
- [ ] Frontend tests pass (`npm test -- --watchAll=false`)
- [ ] Frontend build passes (`npm run build`)

## Security/Auth impact
- [ ] No auth behavior changed
- [ ] Auth behavior changed and tested (signup/login paths)

## Checklist before merge
- [ ] CI checks `Backend Checks` and `Frontend Checks` are green
- [ ] At least 1 approved review
- [ ] No unresolved review comments
- [ ] This PR is up to date with the target branch
